caseStudies.title: 5 real pranks made with Pranko
caseStudies.subtitle: Upload a photo, describe the prank, and watch the AI work its magic.

cs1.title: Got arrested! 🚔
cs1.desc: A professional portrait transformed into an arrest scene.
cs1.story: Send to your boss 10 minutes before the big meeting. 'Sorry, can't make it in today.'

cs2.title: CEO to homeless
cs2.desc: A sharp suit turned into a down-on-his-luck moment.
cs2.story: Show up to your ex's wedding as the 'guest speaker'. Watch the room lose it.

cs3.title: Grandma breakdancing
cs3.desc: A sweet grandma photo turned into a funky dance video.
cs3.story: Send it on the family WhatsApp group at 7am. Mom will screenshot it before breakfast.

cs4.title: House party aftermath
cs4.desc: A tidy living room turned into post-party chaos.
cs4.story: Send to your roommate: 'We need to talk when you get home.'

cs5.title: Singing in the rain 🌧️
cs5.desc: A simple portrait turned into a musical rain dance.
cs5.story: Send to your crush the night before your date. 'Can't wait for tomorrow.'

testimonials.title: Loved by pranksters worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: Don't take our word for it — hear from people using Pranko

items.name: Marcus
items.quote: Sent a video of 'me' getting chased by a goose to my brother. He lost his mind for a solid 10 minutes.

items.name: Chloe
items.quote: Made a video for my best friend's birthday. She cried happy tears. Best $1.99 I ever spent.

items.name: Dev
items.quote: Used it to prank my co-founder. The group chat exploded. Still waiting for Series A though.

items.name: Sophia
items.quote: Showed my kids a video of 'me' riding a dolphin. Their jaws dropped. Pure magic.

items.name: Jamal
items.quote: My mom still asks about the video of 'me' with a full tattoo sleeve. I'm never telling her.

items.name: Aisha
items.quote: For $4.99 a week I deliver 6 high-quality pranks to my family WhatsApp. ROI is off the charts.

items.name: Ryan
items.quote: Told my roommate someone posted him 'wrestling an alligator' on TikTok. He searched for 45 minutes.

items.name: Lina
items.quote: I don't know how the AI makes these look so real. Genuinely unsettling in the best way possible.

faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Pranko
faq.a1: Yes — Pranko is designed for fun pranks between consenting friends. Only upload photos of yourself. We add a visible AI watermark to every video. Don't use it for fraud, impersonation, or anything illegal — our Terms prohibit that.
faq.a2: Photos are uploaded to fal.ai for generation only. We don't keep your images — they're deleted after your video is created. Generated videos are kept for 48 hours so you can share, then automatically removed.
faq.a3: Upload any JPEG, PNG, or WebP from phone or desktop (max 20MB). Videos are vertical 9:16 optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Everything works in your browser — no app needed.
faq.a4: Absolutely. Cancel with one click from your Account page. No long-term contracts, no cancellation fees. Unused credits reset each billing period.
